census_population.desc: US Census county population estimates 2020-2023. No FIPS column.
census_population.join_on: Unnamed: 0 (name string, strip leading '.' for counties)
census_population.quirks: No FIPS. Strip leading '.' from county names.

naco.desc: NACo county economics — links.txt only, no local data.
naco.quirks: CRITICAL: No tabular data locally. Skip.

nors.desc: CDC NORS Salmonella outbreaks 1998-2021. 39 relational sheets, joined via CDCID.
nors.quirks: Serotype in GenEtiology sheet (join CDCID). ExposureCounty uses '***' for suppressed.

pulsenet.desc: CDC PulseNet Salmonella isolates 1996-2023. 582,022 records in 6 xlsx files.
pulsenet.quirks: Normalize SourceType/PatientSex with .str.upper().str.strip(). IsolatDate is datetime (dtype=object). Concat all 6 files.

map_the_meal_gap.desc: Feeding America county food insecurity rates 2009-2020. 12 annual xlsx files.
map_the_meal_gap.rows: ~3143 per year (varies; 2022 file has 6285 rows covering 2019+2020 combined)
map_the_meal_gap.quirks: The data has a reporting delay of 2 years e.g. MMG_2011_2009 is data published in 2011, but about 2009. Column and sheet names change every year. Find FI rate column by searching for 'insecurity'. 2018: header=1. 2022 file covers 2019+2020.

social_vulnerability_index.desc: CDC/ATSDR SVI, US county level, 2020 and 2022. 158 cols, ~3143 rows.
social_vulnerability_index.quirks: FIPS is integer, zero-pad for joins. RPL_THEMES=overall vulnerability (0=least,1=most). E_=count, EP_=%, EPL_=percentile, RPL_=rank.
